console_errors.message: https://www.doubao.com/chat/ - The Content Security Policy directive 'upgrade-insecure-requests' is ignored when delivered in a report-only policy.

usable_learning_notes: left history/navigation is quiet and collapsible-feeling; main reading area stays wide
composer is large, centered, with tool chips attached to the input surface
actions are named by user intent, not backend capability
